info.title: Ontology Platform MVP6.2 Active Learning Planning API
info.description: Planning-only OpenAPI artifact for MVP6.2 Active Learning / Continuous Improvement. This artifact is additive and does not replace the MVP6.1 OpenAPI draft.

tags.name: MVP6.2 Active Learning
tags.description: Read-mostly learning signal, correction pattern, prompt suggestion, and preview-only auto-approval contracts.

get.description: Read-only project summary generated from approved MVP3, MVP4, and MVP6.1 source artifacts. This endpoint must not create or refresh signals as a side effect.
Read-only list of correction patterns grouped from traceable learning signals. Patterns are advisory and must retain source artifact references.
Read-only prompt suggestion list. Suggestions may include preview text and structured proposals, but do not create prompt drafts or mutate prompt versions.
Read-only recommendation previews. These candidates are not enforced and cannot create, update, enable, or execute auto-approval policies.

post.summary: Record prompt suggestion decision audit note
post.description: Creates a human accept or dismiss decision audit note only. This endpoint must not mutate prompt versions, candidates, published graph data, extraction jobs, evaluation runs, model runs, or auto-approval policies.

safety_notes: Summary is advisory and does not mutate prompts, candidates, policies, or published graph data.

items.title: Relation direction errors for includes
items.explanation: Observed repeated source/target reversal for the includes relation in review corrections and evaluation error cases.
items.safety_note: Pattern is advisory. It correlates observed review corrections and benchmark errors; it does not prove the prompt is the only cause.

items.title: Add direction example for InsuranceProduct includes Rider
items.rationale: Twelve recent artifacts show reversed direction for the includes relation.
items.expected_impact: May reduce relation direction errors for product-rider extraction in the next prompt draft.
items.preview_text: When extracting includes, use InsuranceProduct as source and Rider as target. Example: InsuranceProduct - includes -> Rider.
items.safety_note: Accepting this suggestion records human intent only. It does not edit prompt-v12 or create a new prompt version.

items.title: Possible approval preview for high-confidence evidence-complete Product includes Rider relations

outcomes.reason: Evidence complete and no failed validation

items.safety_note: Recommendation only. Not enforced. Requires later policy approval before any policy is created or enabled.

value.note: The pattern mixes two source types; wait for more review evidence.

decision_audit_note.note: The pattern mixes two source types; wait for more review evidence.

suggestion_snapshot.title: Add direction example for InsuranceProduct includes Rider
suggestion_snapshot.preview_text: When extracting includes, use InsuranceProduct as source and Rider as target.
